channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Dan Jarvis named new defence secretary as Al Carns quits government – UK politics as it happened
item.description: Dan Jarvis named new defence secretary as Al Carns quits government – UK politics as it happened

item.title: BBC Politics: Armed forces minister quits after Healey exit as defence funding row deepens
item.description: Armed forces minister quits after Healey exit as defence funding row deepens

item.title: The Guardian: Power games in a pub garden as MPs seek Burnham’s favour in Makerfield - The Guardian
item.description: Power games in a pub garden as MPs seek Burnham’s favour in Makerfield - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer accused of ‘not listening’ as Al Carns becomes second defence minister to resign in 24 hours - live updates
item.description: Starmer accused of ‘not listening’ as Al Carns becomes second defence minister to resign in 24 hours - live updates

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Something bleak about watching this govt just lamely fizzle out. Unable to take decisions; waiting for Burnham but not convinced he’s got it; PM not even really using the ‘sod it, what have I got to lose’ freedom you ...
item.description: Something bleak about watching this govt just lamely fizzle out. Unable to take decisions; waiting for Burnham but not convinced he’s got it; PM not even really using the ‘sod it, what have I got to lose’ freedom you ...

item.title: The Times: Keir Starmer’s leadership in chaos as defence ministers quit - The Times
item.description: Keir Starmer’s leadership in chaos as defence ministers quit - The Times

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: My analysis tonight - on how both sides have reasons to feel aggrieved.
But it is another case for the prosecution against Keir Starmer, because defence and security was the one area where he was outperforming expect...
item.description:
My analysis tonight - on how both sides have reasons to feel aggrieved.
But it is another case for the prosecution against Keir Starmer, because defence and security was the one area where he was outperforming expect...

item.title: The Telegraph: Healey resignation torpedoes Starmer - The Telegraph
item.description: Healey resignation torpedoes Starmer - The Telegraph

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Now Starmer’s Rivals Can Turn Defense Into Attack - Bloomberg.com
item.description: Now Starmer’s Rivals Can Turn Defense Into Attack - Bloomberg.com

item.title: Reuters: UK defence minister quits, says Starmer not spending enough to keep country safe - Reuters
item.description: UK defence minister quits, says Starmer not spending enough to keep country safe - Reuters
